title: Security Audit Log — Production Readiness Certification

audits.detail: All 3 boundaries secure: runtime, data, network. Sandbox active, network policy enforced.
All capabilities have active guards: dag_execution, tool_synthesis, data_migration.
Complete trace chain across all layers (i2→i3→i1→f2→f4). Zero gaps.
All components have rollback paths: deployer, migrator. Data preservation confirmed.
Full compliance (100%) — all 27 laws and 5 rules verified.
All dependencies satisfied. No isolation violations.
100 concurrent DAGs: 100/100 successful. P99 latency: 50ms (< 200ms threshold). Throughput: 854237 DAGs/sec.
Oscillation guard active. No oscillation detected in production load pattern.
All 11 transitions (C1-C11) and 5 guards (G-C1-G-C5) verified. Deterministic evaluation confirmed.
Certificate generated with SHA-256 hash. Status: certified. Grade: A.

summary.recommendation: System is certified for production deployment at v4.5.0-prod-ready
